basic_details.job_title: DCPU Banka Support Person Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 20 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Child Protection Unit Banka (DCPU Banka)
basic_details.short_information: District Child Protection Unit Banka (DCPU Banka) Support Person Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of DCPU Banka. A total of 20 vacancies have been announced through the DCPU Banka Support Person Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 30 years Maximum Age: 65 years Age as on 01 May 2026

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate in Social Work (MSW)/Sociology/Psychology/Child Development or Law or Diploma in Child Rights/Counseling with Graduate degree in any subject and three years work experience
qualification.details: Post Graduate in Social Work (MSW)/Sociology/Psychology/Child Development or Law or Diploma in Child Rights/Counseling along with Graduate degree in any subject and three years work experience.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 9000/- per POCSO case (in three installments)
salary_details.details: Rs. 9000/- per POCSO case (in three installments)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DCPU Banka Support Person Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://banka.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 04-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: DCPU Banka Support Person Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DCPU Banka Support Person Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://banka.nic.in . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 04-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DCPU Banka Support Person Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DCPU Banka Support Person recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DCPU Banka Support Person recruitment is 04 July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Support Person post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 20 vacancies announced for the Support Person position by the District Child Protection Unit Banka.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Support Person role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate degree in Social Work (MSW), Sociology, Psychology, Child Development, or Law, or a Diploma in Child Rights/Counseling with a Graduate degree in any subject and three years of work experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this position?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 30 years, and the maximum age limit is 65 years as of 01 May 2026.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Support Person position?
faq.answer: The salary is Rs. 9000/- per POCSO case, payable in three installments.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the DCPU Banka Support Person recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. In which mode should the application be submitted?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted in offline mode. Candidates need to download the form, fill it, and send it via post.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website for DCPU Banka?
faq.answer: The official website for the District Child Protection Unit Banka is https://banka.nic.in.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section provided in this article.
